title: Bionano Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Provides a Business Update
text: Bionano reported Q1 2026 total revenue of $6.7 million, up 4% year-over-year. Product revenue reached $6.1 million while consumables revenue grew 20% to $3.9 million. The company sold 8,178 nanochannel array flow cells, a 17% increase from the prior year period. Gross margin improved to 49% compared to 46% in Q1 2025. Operating expenses decreased 2% to $11.1 million, though adjusted operating expenses increased 7% to $9.1 million. Key developments included activation of a new Category I CPT code (81354) for optical genome mapping in constitutional genetic disorders. Additionally, the Medicare payment determination for CPT code 81195 increased 47%, rising from $1,263.53 to $1,853.22. The company noted: The Bionano business is healthy, with first quarter results reflecting the continued engagement of our installed base and positive utilization trends. Management provided 2026 guidance projecting Q2 revenue between $7.5-$7.8 million and full-year revenue of $30-$33 million.
